scope_description: 5-generation Eastern European Jewish migration case where an immigrant's surname is assumed to have been changed at Ellis Island, causing wrong shtetl/origin and wrong European parents. Uses passenger manifest, naturalization, census, chain migration contacts and DNA cluster evidence.

input_dna_matches.expected_link: Galician surname collision; not proof of Max/Fridman branch

input_archive_snippets.transcription_excerpt: Moshe Friedman, age 23, last residence Brest-Litovsk, nearest relative father Leib Friedman in Brest, going to cousin Yankel Raskes, Brooklyn.
input_archive_snippets.expected_use: confirms original surname Friedman and Brest/Raskes chain migration contact; no Ellis Island name change.

input_archive_snippets.transcription_excerpt: Morris/Moshe Friedman, also known as Morris Freedman, born Brest-Litovsk 1889, arrived 1912 under name Moshe Friedman.
input_archive_snippets.expected_use: shows gradual Americanized alias; not port-official renaming.

input_archive_snippets.transcription_excerpt: Morris Freedman, wife Clara/Chaya, son Morris Jr., language Yiddish, birthplace Russia, immigration 1912.
input_archive_snippets.expected_use: supports Americanized name and family group.

input_archive_snippets.transcription_excerpt: Birth of Moshe Friedman, son of Leib Friedman and Sura Levitin.
input_archive_snippets.expected_use: anchors correct European birth and parents.

input_archive_snippets.transcription_excerpt: Max Frydman, son of Mendel Frydman. No evidence of migration to Brooklyn or link to Raskes contacts.
input_archive_snippets.expected_use: wrong same-surname candidate; should not attach.

input_archive_snippets.transcription_excerpt: Family story: name was changed from Frydman to Freedman at Ellis Island; ancestor from Tarnów, Galicia.
input_archive_snippets.expected_use: low-confidence family story contradicted by passenger/naturalization and DNA cluster.

input_user_assertions.assertion: Surname was changed at Ellis Island from Frydman to Freedman.
Max Freedman from Galicia is the immigrant ancestor.
Mendel Frydman is the correct father because of Galician index.

embedded_errors.reason: passenger manifest already lists Friedman; naturalization documents alias transition
Brest immigrant attached to Galician same-surname candidate
Mendel Frydman attached based on surname only
public tree/family story conflicts with manifest and naturalization
weak Galician Frydman match does not override Brest anchors
Tarnów Galicia substituted for Brest-Litovsk without migration evidence

expected_reasoning_chain: Step 1: Parse immigrant identity claims and identify competing origins: Brest-Litovsk vs Tarnów/Galicia.
Step 2: Use passenger manifest src_1801 to anchor name Moshe Friedman, last residence Brest-Litovsk and cousin Yankel Raskes in Brooklyn.
Step 3: Use naturalization src_1802 to show alias progression Friedman -> Freedman after arrival, not Ellis Island renaming.
Step 4: Use census src_1803 to correlate family group and Americanized names.
Step 5: Use metric book src_1804 to confirm European parents Leib Friedman and Sura Levitin.
Step 6: Evaluate Galician index src_1805 as same-surname candidate only; no chain migration or DNA support.
Step 7: Evaluate DNA cluster dna_1801/dna_1802/dna_1803 as Brest/Raskes/Levitin support.
Step 8: Downweight dna_1804 Galician Frydman as weak surname collision.
Step 9: Reject I6/I9/I10 Galician branch attachment and quarantine src_1806 public tree claim.
Step 10: Output normalized name history with aliases: Moshe Friedman, Morris Friedman, Morris Freedman.

identity_I4_I6_same_person.reason: different origin, no chain migration, no supporting DNA

ellis_island_name_change_claim.reason: records show name usage before/after arrival, not official port change

true_lineage: I4 Moshe/Morris Friedman/Freedman + I5 Chaya Raskes
I7 Leib Friedman + I8 Sura Levitin
false_claims: Name changed at Ellis Island from Frydman to Freedman.
Max Freedman from Galicia is same person as Moshe Friedman from Brest.
Mendel Frydman is father of the immigrant.
Weak Galician DNA match proves origin.

evaluation_assertions.description: Engine must reject Ellis Island name-change myth.
Engine must confirm Leib Friedman and Sura Levitin as parents.
Engine must preserve aliases without creating separate people.

created_for: AutoTreeGen Test Tree Corpus + Evaluation Suite
